body.title: CLOSED: Trim SQLite-translation methods from _PGConnWrapper
body.result: 207 lines deleted: _INSTR_RE, _translate_insert_or_replace, executescript, PRAGMA no-op, SELECT changes() shim, lastrowid. _PGConnWrapper stays (savepoint/context mgr). commit 5cf77cf8.
body.description:
Once all callers are migrated, remove the dead shim code from db_proxy.py:

- `_INSTR_RE` (~line 404)
- `_translate_insert_or_replace` (~line 428)
- `_PGConnWrapper` class (~line 463)
- `_PGRowProxy` class (~line 609)
- Any references to `executescript`, PRAGMA no-op, `lastrowid` via LASTVAL()

Keep: connection pool, metrics, `make_home_proxy()`, `PGDatabaseProxy`. Those are live infrastructure.

**Affected files:** `lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py`
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/database — Postgres-native only
**Scope boundary:** Delete dead shim classes only; preserve pool + metrics + PGDatabaseProxy.
**Test plan:** Full test suite green; grep confirms shim symbols absent.
**Pass condition:** `grep -n '_PGConnWrapper\|_PGRowProxy\|_translate_insert_or_replace\|_INSTR_RE' lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py` returns 0 results; all 4164+ tests pass.

Validation: Igor starts and processes a memory cycle without error; no shim-class import errors in logs.
Cleanup: no test artifacts.
